subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from the Primal Point unto him who hath believed in God and His signs, that he may stand firm in the Cause and be detached [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من نقطه الاولی الی الذی آمن بالله و آیاته لیستقیم علی الامر و ینقطع
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
